title: 75 Days Hard English Challenge
description: A structured 75-day journey from zero English to confident, professional, error-free speaking — covering grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, speaking, writing, listening and reading every single day.
hindiDescription: शून्य अंग्रेज़ी से आत्मविश्वास से भरी, पेशेवर और त्रुटि-मुक्त अंग्रेज़ी बोलने तक की 75 दिन की संरचित यात्रा — जिसमें हर दिन grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, speaking, writing, listening और reading शामिल है।

phases.title: Modal Verbs & Wishes
phases.focus: Want, let, would like to, can, should, may, must

phases.title: Advanced Modals
phases.focus: Used to, could, perfect modals, will/shall/would

phases.title: Tenses & Prepositions
phases.focus: All tenses, prepositions, has to/have to

phases.title: Semi-Modals & Structures
phases.focus: Going to, about to, need to, conjunctions, passive voice

phases.title: Reported Speech & Vocabulary
phases.focus: Reported speech, comparatives, conditionals, vocabulary categories

phases.title: Final Revision
phases.focus: Complete revision and final mock test
